title: corybas striatus
intro: Corybas striatus, also known as the striated hood orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Corybas striatus are said to include relieving respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, Corybas striatus is often used in tinctures, teas, and infusions, but due to its rarity and endangered status, it is not widely available and its use is often restricted to traditional and indigenous medicine practices.
